data: Respondents were asked, "These next questions are about your hearing without the use of hearing aids or other listening devices. Is your hearing excellent, good, [do you have] a little trouble hearing, moderate trouble, a lot of trouble, or are you deaf?" The categories "a little trouble hearing," "moderate trouble," "a lot of trouble," and "deaf" are combined into one category.
